After absorbing 50 spell levels, the stone burns out and turns dull gray, forever useless.Â This stone works like aÂ rod of absorption, but absorbing a spell requires aÂ readied Â action, and cannot be used toÂ empowerÂ spells. Cracked: This stone absorbs spells of 2nd level or lower. After absorbing 10 spell levels, the stone burns out and turns dull gray. Price: 10,000 gp. Flawed: This stone absorbs spells of 6th level or lower, which deals 2 hit points of damage to the wearer for each spell level absorbed. After absorbing 50 spell levels, the stone burns out and turns dull gray. Price: 36,000 gp. See Inferior Ioun Stones for details on cracked and flawed variant stones. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item; Special creator must be 12th level; Cost 20,000 gp.
